raw_consumer_statement:
I raised a complaint with CFPB a month ago and American Express closed this complaint without refunding both the transactions that I mentioned in the complaint. 
This is the complaint : XXXX There were XXXX transactions mentioned in teh complaint. They put up a message in their " dispute section '' of XXXX of the transactions that they find merit in my dispute and refunded XXXX transaction but they closed the complaint without acknoeledging the other other which the merchant charged at the same time. 

While the details of the transactions and issues are mentioned in the complaint XXXX, here is a summary : The merchant XXXX sold me a flight ticket worth around XXXX $ which I had to reschedule. The flight was with XXXX XXXX and when I called XXXX XXXX directly, they said they were happy to reschedule the flight for free but they are not able to do it as it was booked through flighthub. So i contacted flighthub. They dont pick up the phone so I had to talk to them on chat. On chat, they dont have any human available so I had to work with their AI chatbot who basically asked me to pay 2000 $ for rescheduling fee for a XXXX $ flight ( XXXX $ listed on their own website ). To collect proof of their malicious attempt to scam me, I prompted it various dates to reschedule the flight but it asked to pay 2000 $ after everytime I confirmed the change saying " oh the flight prices increased in XXXX last few minutes by 2000 $ so I need to pay 2000 $ more ''. I took screenshots of these scam attempt and sent to amex however, for XXXX of the dates, the AI just rebooked the flight to that date and charge me XXXX for the airline scheduling fee and XXXX $ for their rescheduling for a XXXX $ flight ticket that I cant use now. And now they are not acknowledging if they were trying to scam me of 2000 $ or if they have an issue in their AI and I am stuck with this ticket on a date that I dont want to travel. 

Amex has all these screenshots but they not acknowledging the scam that this website attempted to extract 2000 $ from me and are not refunding even the XXXX $ rescheduling fee that they already admitted in the previous complaint that it has legitimate grounds for a dispute. 

I am left with a XXXX $ ticket with an additional XXXX $ fee for a date that I never wanted because Amex wants to side with a scammer.
